title: Code of Conduct and Workplace Behavior Expectations
text:
Q: What are the company's expectations regarding code of conduct and workplace behavior?
A: The company expects all employees to adhere to a high standard of conduct and professionalism in the workplace. This includes treating colleagues, clients, and stakeholders with respect and courtesy, maintaining a collaborative environment, and upholding integrity in all actions. Employees should avoid any form of harassment, discrimination, or bullying, and are encouraged to report any incidents to HR within 24 hours. Additionally, punctuality and accountability are essential; employees are expected to arrive on time and meet deadlines consistently. Violations of the code of conduct may result in disciplinary action, which could include verbal warnings, written reprimands, or termination, depending on the severity of the offense. For any questions or to report concerns, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com or visit the HR office during business hours.
